summary.text: Historical data is provided by S&P Global Market Intelligence. Real-time stock price data is provided by CBOE and 15-minute delayed consolidated tape pricing data is provided by Nasdaq UTP. Several fund data points are also provided by Finnhub.

overview.description: The PIMCO Commodity Strategy Active Exchange-Traded Fund (CMDT) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in broad market commodities. The fund actively manages a portfolio of commodity-linked investments, which aims to provide alpha, a hedge against inflation, and diversification for a broad portfolio. The fund utilizes a subsidiary to provide exposure. CMDT was launched on May 8, 2023 and is issued by PIMCO.
